query: SELECT id, tenantId, locationId, isActive, expiresAt, lastRefreshedAt, lastError, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), expiresAt) as minutes_until_expiry FROM ghl_oauth_tokens WHERE tenantId = 1;
